verse_text: Now I rejoice, not that you were made sorry, but that your sorrow led to repentance. For you were made sorry in a godly manner, that you might suffer loss from us in nothing.

links.context: These words are not just for the false teachers, but for us all. We are granted more time primarily to grant us fuller repentance. (See v. 15; [[2CO.7:9]], [[2CO.7:10]].)
